item.title: AI ate software. Now it's eating math! I think the day is very close when progress will become so massive that it'll be harder to track. Every breakthrough will open the door to countless more. Innova
item.description: pAI ate software. Now it's eating math!br /br /I think the day is very close when progress will become so massive that it'll be harder to track.br /br /Every breakthrough will open the door to countless more.br /br /Innovators and builders will create enormous value & wealth, that money become irrel

item.title: PALO ALTO, California -- Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion as artificial intelligence investments ballooned, a Nikkei study shows,
item.description: pPALO ALTO, California -- Hidden debt at U.S. tech giants swelled eightfold in roughly four years to an estimated $1.65 trillion as artificial intelligence investments ballooned, a Nikkei study shows, exceeding actual debt and making it tougher for investors to assess risk.br /Nikkei examined recent

item.title: Frontier AI lab misalignment risk, lessons from trading post-2008
item.description: pspanIn this post, I propose adapting banking risk management frameworks (specifically capital adequacy requirements like Basel III) to frontier AI labs. By forcing them to hold capital reserved proportionate to their model misalignment risks, we align market incentives directly with catastrophic ri

It was my first solo project and I learned a lot! Feedback is super welcome :)/span/i/ppbspanCode and full resul

item.title: The AI Safety Illusion: Why Current Safety Datasets Fool Us on Model Safety
item.description: pspanAI models are increasingly trained to be “safe,” meaning they refuse harmful requests. But what does it truly mean for a model to be safe? Today, this is typically assessed using safety benchmarks: curated collections of adversarial prompts designed to test whether a model will refuse dangerous

item.title: Armstrong Says His X Posts and Avatars Are Not Token Endorsements
item.description: The Coinbase CEO told traders not to treat his personal account as alpha after his profile-picture changes fueled a memecoin trading frenzy.

item.title: AI 2040: Is it Actually a Deal?
item.description: pThe "AI Futures Project" has released their a href="https://ai-2040.com/"AI 2040: Plan A/a scenario./ppWhile their previous scenario a href="https://ai-2027.com/"AI 2027/a was a forecast of what they thought a future with many powerful AIs would look like, AI 2040 is intended to be normative -- it'

item.title: AI Voice Phishing Performs on Par With Human Scammers at a Fraction of the Cost
item.description: pbspanTL;DR: /span/bspanWe ran a large-scale human-subject study (n=4,100) to measure susceptibility to AI-powered voice phishing, using six leading AI voice models. They achieved high compliance rates, with up to 36% of participants who would or might fall for the scam. Participants struggled to di

item.title: You can functionally replace all political dialogue with boomers using an LLM trained on MLK speeches, Schoolhouse Rock, Schindler’s List, and Eat Pray Love. Instruct it to say “social construct” roug
item.description: pYou can functionally replace all political dialogue with boomers using an LLM trained on MLK speeches, Schoolhouse Rock, Schindler’s List, and Eat Pray Love. Instruct it to say “social construct” roughly once every 50 words.br /br /This will reproduce the dialogue and reasoning capacity with approx

item.title: 25 Years After Code Red: What the Worm Era Can Teach Us About AI Security
item.description: Marc Maiffret reflects on Code Red's legacy and the security lessons helping organizations navigate AI risk today.

item.title: CISOs Feel the Heat Over AI Risk
item.description: Job pressures have increased as companies run headlong into AI adoption, causing 26% of top security executives to consider leaving their position.
